name: daily-ai-brief-production-baseline-candidate
description: Phase 5 (agent-system-redesign epic) validation baseline: re-expresses the REAL, live production daily-ai-brief-agent's model/system-prompt/skill/tools configuration as a candidate on the decoupled cloud topology, adapted to drop all delivery/AWS responsibilities (content generation only -- research + write, no narration/email/archival). This is a SEPARATE agent resource from the real live production agent (agent_01EswBTose8dnTAUDbGvzdLq) -- syncing or triggering this candidate can NEVER mutate or invoke the real scheduled agent. See candidate.json for the full validation-scope description.
